name: List.Focus

values.name: append
values.comment:
Append an element to the end of a Focus.

    singleton 1
      |> append [2, 3]
      |> toList --> [1, 2, 3]

    singleton 1
      |> append [2, 3]
      |> focused --> 1
values.type: List.List a -> List.Focus.Focus a -> List.Focus.Focus a

values.name: first
values.comment:
Focus first element if list is empty

    singleton 1
        |> append [2, 3]
        |> next
        |> Maybe.andThen next
        |> Maybe.map first
        |> Maybe.map focused --> Just 1

    singleton 1
        |> append [2, 3, 4]
        |> next
        |> Maybe.andThen next
        |> Maybe.map first
        |> Maybe.map toList --> Just [1, 2, 3, 4]

values.name: focused
values.comment:
Get the focused element of a Focus.

    singleton 1
      |> focused --> 1

values.name: last
values.comment:
Focus last element if list is empty

    singleton 1
        |> append [2, 3]
        |> last
        |> focused --> 3

    singleton 1
        |> append [2, 3, 4]
        |> last
        |> toList --> [1, 2, 3, 4]

values.name: map
values.comment:
Map over a Focus, with information about the focus.

    singleton 1
      |> append [2, 3]
      |> map (\x -> x+1)
      |> toList --> [2, 3, 4]

values.name: mapParts
values.comment:
Information about the focus.

    singleton 1
      |> append [2, 3, 4, 5]
      |> prepend [0]
      |> next
      |> Maybe.map (mapParts
        { before = \i x -> (i, x, "before")
        , focus = \i x -> (i, x, "focus")
        , after = \i x -> (i, x, "after")
        })
       |> Maybe.map toList
    --> Just
    -->   [ (0, 0, "before")
    -->   , (1, 1, "before")
    -->   , (2, 2, "focus")
    -->   , (3, 3, "after")
    -->   , (4, 4, "after")
    -->   , (5, 5, "after")
    -->   ]

    -- Getting all elements after the focus.
    singleton 1
      |> append [2, 3, 4, 5]
      |> prepend [0]
      |> next
      |> Maybe.map (mapParts
        { before = \_ _ -> Nothing
        , focus = \_ _ -> Nothing
        , after = \_ -> Just
        })
       |> Maybe.map toList
       |> Maybe.withDefault []
       |> List.filterMap identity
       --> [3, 4, 5]
values.type: { before : Basics.Int -> a -> b, focus : Basics.Int -> a -> b, after : Basics.Int -> a -> b } -> List.Focus.Focus a -> List.Focus.Focus b

values.name: next
values.comment:
Move the focus to the next element in a Focus.

    singleton 1
      |> append [2, 3]
      |> next
      |> Maybe.map focused --> Just 2

    singleton 1
      |> next
      |> Maybe.map focused --> Nothing

    singleton 1
      |> append [2, 3]
      |> next
      |> Maybe.map focused --> Just 2

values.name: prepend
values.comment:
Prepend an element to the beginning of a Focus.

    singleton 1
      |> prepend [2, 3]
      |> toList --> [2, 3, 1]

    singleton 1
      |> prepend [2, 3]
      |> focused --> 1
values.type: List.List a -> List.Focus.Focus a -> List.Focus.Focus a

values.name: previous
values.comment:
Move the focus to the previous element in a Focus.

    singleton 1
      |> append [2, 3]
      |> next
      |> Maybe.andThen next
      |> Maybe.andThen previous
      |> Maybe.map focused --> Just 2


    singleton 1
      |> previous
      --> Nothing

values.name: singleton
values.comment:
Create a Focus with a single element.

    singleton 1
      |> focused --> 1

values.name: toList
values.comment:
Get the elements of a Focus as a list.

    singleton 1
      |> toList --> [1]
